name: character
description: Privacy operative — teal hoodie, cyber visor, Phase 1 art
notes: At PLAYER_SCALE=1.3: 26x42px on-screen at 480x270 internal res
Visor (#34e7ff) is the primary readability cue at small scale
2px cyan rim on right torso edge separates figure from dark facades
Walk frames use ±4px shoe stride and ±2px arm counter-swing
